name: Emboss Backtranseq
description: Translate a protein sequence back to a nucleic acid sequence using a chosen codon usage table.
capabilities: Translate a protein sequence back to a nucleic acid sequence using a chosen codon usage table

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence to back-translate to nucleic acid

codon_table.description: Codon usage table to use for back-translation (e.g., organism name or table ID)
